---

## Scoring Guide

| Score | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| 5 | Fully meets or exceeds the requirement — clear evidence, no gaps |
| 4 | Meets the requirement — minor gaps or clarifications needed |
| 3 | Partially meets — significant gaps but addressable |
| 2 | Weak — major gaps, unlikely to be resolved without significant work |
| 1 | Does not meet the requirement |
